decision.recommendation: This tender is suitable if catalogue, material specifications, sample approval process, GST/PAN, EMD, warranty undertaking, and installation capacity are ready.

beforeApply.label: GST and PAN documents are ready
Product catalogue and material sheet are available
Sample furniture can be presented for approval
Delivery and installation team is available

source.title: Bidder Documents
source.text: The bidder shall submit GST registration certificate and PAN copy along with the technical bid.

source.title: Catalogue and Specifications
source.text: The bidder shall submit catalogue, technical specifications and material details for all furniture items.

source.title: Sample Approval
source.text: Supply shall commence only after approval of sample items by the nominated inspection committee.

source.title: Earnest Money Deposit
source.text: Earnest Money Deposit of ₹84,000 shall be submitted through online mode before closing date.

source.title: Warranty
source.text: Furniture items shall carry minimum one year warranty against manufacturing defects and poor workmanship.

eligibility.title: Specification compliance
eligibility.text: Catalogue, technical specifications and material details must be submitted for all items.

source.title: Catalogue and Specifications
source.text: The bidder shall submit catalogue, technical specifications and material details for all furniture items.

eligibility.title: Sample approval before supply
eligibility.text: Supply can begin only after sample approval by the inspection committee.

source.title: Sample Approval
source.text: Supply shall commence only after approval of sample items by the nominated inspection committee.

eligibility.title: Inspection-based acceptance
eligibility.text: Supply will be accepted only after departmental inspection and approval.

source.title: Inspection and Acceptance
source.text: Supply shall be accepted only after inspection and approval by the department.

source.title: Estimated Value
source.text: The estimated procurement value for office furniture is ₹42 lakh inclusive of delivery and installation.

source.title: Earnest Money Deposit
source.text: Earnest Money Deposit of ₹84,000 shall be submitted through online mode before closing date.

source.title: Payment Terms
source.text: Payment shall be released only after delivery, installation, inspection and acceptance of furniture items.

source.title: Warranty
source.text: Furniture items shall carry minimum one year warranty against manufacturing defects and poor workmanship.

source.title: Quality Rejection
source.text: Items not conforming to approved samples or specifications shall be rejected and replaced at bidder's cost.

technical.requirement: Office tables, chairs, storage units and visitor seating

source.title: Scope of Supply
source.text: The scope includes supply of office tables, ergonomic chairs, storage cabinets and visitor seating for government offices.

source.title: Catalogue and Specifications
source.text: The bidder shall submit catalogue, technical specifications and material details for all furniture items.

source.title: Sample Approval
source.text: Supply shall commence only after approval of sample items by the nominated inspection committee.

technical.requirement: Delivery and installation at department locations

source.title: Delivery and Installation
source.text: The bidder shall deliver, assemble and install furniture at locations specified by the department.

technical.requirement: Items subject to inspection and approval

source.title: Inspection and Acceptance
source.text: Supply shall be accepted only after inspection and approval by the department.

risks.title: Sample rejection risk
risks.explanation: Bulk supply cannot start without sample approval.

source.text: Supply shall commence only after approval of sample items by the nominated inspection committee.

risks.title: Payment after inspection
risks.explanation: Payment will be released only after delivery, installation and acceptance.

missingInformation: Exact sample approval timeline is not specified
Approved material brands are not listed
Inspection committee composition is not mentioned
Penalty for delayed replacement is unclear
departmentQuestions: Will equivalent material specifications be accepted?
How many sample units are required before approval?
What is the inspection timeline after delivery?
Will payment be released item-wise or only after complete delivery?
Are installation floors and room numbers available before dispatch?
proposalDraft:
Dear Sir/Madam,

We are pleased to submit our proposal for office furniture procurement for the Directorate of Higher Education against tender reference DHE/ADMIN/2026/077. We confirm that we have reviewed the eligibility criteria, technical requirements, financial terms, delivery obligations, and compliance documents mentioned in the tender.

We undertake to submit all required certificates, declarations, financial documents, and technical compliance details as part of the bid. We also confirm our ability to execute the work within the prescribed timeline subject to final award and work order.

Regards,
Authorized Signatory
